title: bus.subscribers.snapshot v1
description: Periodic snapshot of active plugin subscribers per channel. Published by the nervous-bus Zellij plugin every 30s so consumers (e.g. cc-bus-dashboard) can surface 'silent channel with active subscribers' alerts. This is a push-based alternative to the 'nervous subscribers' query command.

plugin_ids.description: Zellij plugin IDs currently subscribed to this channel
